# EKO Wedding Films

> Husband and wife wedding videography team based in Bournemouth, Dorset. Natural, candid wedding films across Dorset, Hampshire and South England.

## Business

- Company: EKO Events Limited (Company Number: 13557941)
- Location: Bournemouth, Dorset, UK
- Service areas: Dorset, Hampshire, Bournemouth, Poole, Southampton, Winchester, New Forest, Portsmouth
- Contact: hello@ekoevents.co.uk

## Services

- Wedding videography (full day and ceremony only)
- Cinematic highlight films
- Drone footage
- Multi-camera coverage
- Professional audio capture

## Packages

- Ceremony Only Package: from £500
- Full Wedding Signature Package: from £1,650
- All packages include: multi-camera filming, professional audio, cinematic editing, digital delivery
